name: Tidycal
description: Tidycal — Simple scheduling tool by AppSumo with REST API for embedding booking pages and managing appointments.

seo.title: Tidycal — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Tidycal: Tidycal — Simple scheduling tool by AppSumo with REST API for embedding booking pages and managing appointments.

when_to_use: Simple scheduling with REST API for indie developers
AppSumo-backed booking tool for creator businesses
Embeddable booking page for consultants and coaches
API-driven appointment management for small SaaS
Low-cost Calendly alternative with API access

review.verdict: A cheap lifetime-deal scheduler that covers basics; don't expect depth beyond solo-use booking pages.
review.best_for: Solo consultants on a tight scheduling-tool budget
review.not_for: Teams needing routing, SSO, or deep API workflows
